widgets_values: clean-lined digital illustration of a friendly professional male fire safety consultant, mid-30s, medium build, warm approachable expression, slight confident smile, wearing navy blue polo shirt under high-visibility yellow safety vest, dark slate work trousers, black safety boots, clean-shaven, short brown hair, clear eyes, corporate illustration style, flat colours with subtle shading, colour palette: navy slate (#1e293b), amber yellow (#f59e0b), white background, professional and trustworthy, front-facing portrait, looking directly at viewer, shoulders square, head and shoulders visible

extra.info: Eversfield One character design workflow. Edit the positive prompt (node 6) to change poses. Keep seed fixed (node 3, first widget) for character consistency.
